name: network-map-provider-feeder
description: Manual long-run provider crawler and ingestion dashboard for Network Map.

scripts.check: node --check src/worker.js && node --check src/dashboard.js && node --check src/manualRunner.js && node --check src/appCandidateWriter.js && node --check src/schema.js && node --check scripts/smoke.js && python -m py_compile scripts/import_provider_text.py scripts/extract_medical_providers.py scrapers/network_sources/db.py scrapers/network_sources/pipelines.py scrapers/network_sources/spiders/clinic_directory.py scrapers/network_sources/spiders/generic_provider_url.py scrapers/network_sources/spiders/government_health_discovery.py scrapers/network_sources/spiders/government_health_ingest.py
